<head>
  <meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=UTF-8">

<style>
  body {
    font-family: system-ui, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol";
    background-color: #212D3B;
    color: #DFE5EC;
  }

  .main {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    max-width: 896px;
    margin-left: auto;
    margin-right: auto;
    margin-top: 6rem;
    margin-bottom: 6rem;
  }

  .title {
    color: #DFE5EC;
    font-size: 24px;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 0px;
    margin-top: 0px;
  }

  #challenge-body-text {
    color: #BECBDA;
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: 400;
    margin: 0px;
  }

  #challenge-running {
    color: #BECBDA;
  }

  .caption {
    color: #BECBDA;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 400;
  }

  .footer {
    position: fixed;
    left: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    width: 100%;
    text-align: center;
    padding-bottom: 1rem;
    padding-top: 1rem;
    border-width: 1px 0 0 0;
    border-style: solid;
    border-color: #384A61;
  }

  .robot {
    width: 160px;
    margin: 32px;
  }

  a {
    color: #BECBDA;
    font-weight: 600;
  }

  @media screen and (min-width: 768px) {
    .title {
      font-size: 32px;
    }

    .body {
      font-size: 20px;
    }
  }

  @media screen and (min-width: 768px) {
    .robot {
      width: 224px;
      margin: 30px;
    }
  }
</style>
